content.en:
Ye Tian took the inheritance and the ultimate weapon, and then continued to explore, but found nothing else.

"It's time to get out!"

Ye Tian left from this ruin.

As soon as he came out, Bing Xuan asked excitedly, "Brother Ye, what's wrong?"

"Three inheritances, one ultimate weapon, and a few other treasures. "

Ye Tian took out all the harvest, after all, both of them made an oath, but they didn't dare to break it.

"Three inheritances. "

Bing Xuan was eager to take all three inheritances, but he still didn't dare to break his oath.

First of all, the Ultimate Lord Inheritance is a must, and the second is the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move Inheritance, but it is the Ultimate Secret Law Inheritance, and he can choose to give up.

But he also knew very well that Ye Tian would never agree to such a division.

So, Ye Tian and Bingxuan continued to negotiate, and finally "Five Seven Zero" set a division plan.

Ye Tian only needs the Ultimate Dimension Killing Technique Inheritance, the Ultimate Secret Method Inheritance, and that stone tablet, and everything else is given to Bing Xuan, including the Ultimate Weapon.

In this way, Ye Tian and Bing Xuan completed the allocation of resources.

Immediately, the two of them immediately left this divine dimensional rift.

As soon as he did, Ye Tian disappeared.

"Pretty fast!"

Bing Xuan actually really had the idea of contacting a few friends to besiege and kill Ye Tian, after all, he really wanted to inherit the ultimate dimensional killing moves.

But Ye Tian left, it is estimated that he will not return to Tianwei Pavilion, and the attack will not be carried out.

"Forget it, I've gained enough!"

Bing Xuan said darkly.

......

And not long after, Ye Tian returned to that Divine Dimension Crack and entered that ruin.

There really wasn't anything good about this ruin, and he wouldn't deliberately hide it under the constraints of his oath.

However, this is the best place to retreat, the ultimate strong cannot enter, he can study the ultimate secret method here, only by creating his own ultimate secret method, he can 100% break through to the ultimate powerhouse.

Now, he has two incomplete Ultimate Secret Methods, a complete Ultimate Secret Method inheritance, and he has studied all three of them one after another.

Time passes slowly.

With the help of the research of the three ultimate secret methods, coupled with Ye Tian's natural qualifications, he gradually created an ultimate secret method that suited him.

However, he still needs to perfect this ultimate secret method.

Time flies.

Tens of thousands of gods have passed.

this day.

The ultimate secret method has been perfected to the limit, and there are almost no flaws.

He named this Ultimate Secret Method the Heavenly Dimension Ultimate Secret Method.

"It's time to hit the Ultimate Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

This relic is not suitable for impacting the Ultimate Realm, Ye Tian left here and went out.

Subsequently.

He came to a certain place in the Divine Dimension Domain, but still did not return to the Heavenly Dimension Pavilion.

this day.

He began to attack the Ultimate Realm.

I saw that Ye Tian used his spiritual power to absorb the power of the divine dimension, and operated the ultimate secret method of the heavenly dimension, so that the spiritual power and the power of the divine dimension could be combined.

The two forces continued to merge, and the sense of repulsion was very strong, but with the Tianwei Ultimate Secret Method, the two forces gradually merged into one.

Rumble!!!!!

The spiritual power and the divine power were successfully fused, turning into a trace of ultimate spiritual power.

And this trace of ultimate spiritual power is the beginning, and then all the spiritual power has completed the transformation.

Since his body was tempered too perfectly, it was still a little difficult for him to influence, and it took a long time to stimulate his body.

And this stimulus is a full fifty thousand gods.

Finally.

Ye Tian's body began to transform, and he stepped into the most critical step - Ultimate!

This step is like opening a lock, and the body begins to absorb countless divine powers, so that the body has a trace of ultimate attributes, and at the same time, the physical fitness can continue to improve and skyrocket.

Soon.

His physical fitness continued to improve and skyrocketed, becoming more tenacious and powerful, far beyond the past, and this was only the beginning of his ultimate cultivation.

"Finally broke through to the ultimate powerhouse!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

He now seems to have completely forgotten the cultivation of the multidimensional realm, and only immersed himself in the cultivation of the divine dimension heaven and earth, which is a good thing, so that he can create the ultimate dimensional killing move.

Subsequently, he returned to Tianwei Pavilion.........

With his current strength, he is qualified to keep the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move Inheritance.

After all, the inheritance of this thing is only for reference, but it can't really become its own ultimate dimensional killing move, and its value is still limited.

There will be no Ultimate powerhouse who has mastered the Ultimate Dimension killing move to attack here, and as long as it is not such a powerhouse, other Ultimate Powerhouses, he is not afraid at all.

"It's time to study the Ultimate Dimension Killer Move!"

Ye Tian began to accept the inheritance of the ultimate dimension killing move, although he needed to avenge the other party, but if he couldn't defeat his enemy, he didn't need to take revenge.

Soon.

He accepted this ultimate dimensional killing move.

【Ultimate Dimensional Killing Move-Celestial Wrath】

This is the ultimate dimensional killing move created by the ultimate lord named the Lord of the Heavenly Vine.

Ye Tian took a look, this ultimate dimensional killing move was not suitable for him, but he could learn from it.

In the following years, Ye Tian was studying this ultimate dimensional killing move.

"The ultimate dimensional killing move is too mysterious, almost exerting the power of the divine dimension's physical body to the real limit, and even a killing move that surpasses the limit. "

Time flies.

Ye Tianyi studied the ultimate dimensional killing move, which was a full 500,000 god years.

For such a long time, Tianwei Pavilion has given birth to some seventeenth-dimensional powerhouses, but it is still a little short of giving birth to eighteenth-dimensional powerhouses.

And the more Ye Tian studied the ultimate dimensional killing moves, the more he felt that 3.1 was not enough for himself.

It is not the lack of talent, but the lack of accumulation and the lack of heritage.

And so.

Ye Tian began to make a decision, that is, to travel all over the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, he secretly infiltrated countless small forces, and spied on the killing tricks of these small forces.

The killer tricks of many small forces may not be very clever, but they may be able to bring him a trace of insight!

And just like that, another long time passed.

He has been to too many small forces, witnessed countless systems of the way of the divine dimension, and has a new understanding of the divine dimension and the ultimate dimensional killing moves.

And because he is immersed in the study of the ultimate dimension killing moves, the progress in the ultimate is not so fast, but his own talent is extremely high, resulting in his progress is still far beyond that of other ultimate powerhouses.
